initial_description: i have a google drives called "guidelines". whenever file is added, sent email to: finance@acmecorp.com with subject" guidline added" and a message where it states tat a new file was added to the guidline folder and whether this is correct

interactions.question: Should the email include the file name or just say that a new file was added to the Guidelines folder?
interactions.updated_description: I have a Google Drive folder called "guidelines". Whenever a file is added, send an email to finance@acmecorp.com with the subject "guidline added" and a message stating that a new file was added to the guidelines folder and including the file name.

interactions.question: Should the email be sent for every new file added, or only for certain file types?
interactions.updated_description: I have a Google Drive folder called "guidelines". Whenever every new file is added, send an email to finance@acmecorp.com with the subject "guidline added" and a message stating that a new file was added to the guidelines folder and including the file name.

interactions.question: Should the email be sent for every new file added, or only when a file is added to the "guidelines" folder?
interactions.updated_description: I have a Google Drive folder called "guidelines". Whenever a new file is added to the "guidelines" folder, send an email to finance@acmecorp.com with the subject "guidline added" and a message stating that a new file was added to the guidelines folder and including the file name.

interactions.question: How often would you like me to check the "guidelines" folder for new files — every minute, or a different interval?
interactions.updated_description: I have a Google Drive folder called "guidelines". Check the "guidelines" folder every hour for new files. Whenever a new file is added to the folder, send an email to finance@acmecorp.com with the subject "guidline added" and a message stating that a new file was added to the guidelines folder and including the file name.

interactions.question: Should I send the email to finance@acmecorp.com, or would you like to change that address?
interactions.updated_description: I have a Google Drive folder called "guidelines". Check the "guidelines" folder every hour for new files. Whenever a new file is added to the folder, send an email to finance@acmecorp.com with the subject "guidline added" and a message stating that a new file was added to the guidelines folder and including the file name.

interactions.question: Should the email subject be "guidline added", or would you like to change it?
interactions.answer: yes this is a good subject
interactions.updated_description: I have a Google Drive folder called "guidelines". Check the "guidelines" folder every hour for new files. Whenever a new file is added to the folder, send an email to finance@acmecorp.com with the subject "guidline added" and a message stating that a new file was added to the guidelines folder and including the file name.

interactions.question: Should the email message say: “A new file was added to the guidelines folder. File name: [name]” — or would you like to change it? (The bracketed parts — like [Expense name] — will be automatically replaced with the real values when the automation runs.)
interactions.answer: "Link to the file: [url to the file]."
interactions.updated_description: I have a Google Drive folder called "guidelines". Check the "guidelines" folder every hour for new files. Whenever a new file is added to the folder, send an email to finance@acmecorp.com with the subject "guidline added" and a message stating that a new file was added to the guidelines folder, including the file name and a link to the file.
